titles.title: I Will Fight and Never Give Up

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A believer must be tried and tested How else would I know what I've got in me? You see, my trials only come to make me strong; It's the stepping stone for my perfection.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So, I will fight and I will never give up No, I was born to overcome! I was in Him when the morning stars sang He's the same God when Joshua spoke and stopped the sun; So, be not afraid only be thou strong: Know I'm your God, And I am standing here with you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now the enemy will ask you, "What are you fighting for?" Tell him you came back to take all he took from you; If our God is be for us then tell me who can be against us We've been commissioned to take back our Land.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Lord your God shall deliver you from your enemies, And you shall possess the Land; You keep on pressing: You've come too far to turn back now So, be courageous Fight the good fight of faith.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So, we will fight and we will never give up No, we were born to overcome! We were in Him when the morning stars sang He's the same God when Joshua spoke and stopped the sun; So, be not afraid only be thou strong Know I'm your God, And I am standing here with you.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So, let us fight and let us never give up No, We were born to overcome! We were in Him when the morning stars sang He's the same God when Joshua spoke and stopped the sun; So, be not afraid only be thou strong Know I'm your God, And I am standing here with you.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Be strong now: God is standing here with you; Keep on pressing on: God is standing here with you.
